page.title: Responses
page.subtitle: Professionals interested in your job
page.empty: No responses yet. We'll notify you when professionals engage.
page.notOwner: Only the client who posted this job can view responses.

pro.statusDeclined: This job went to another pro
pro.nudgeAddQuote: Add a quote to stand out
pro.expressedToast: Client notified. Add a quote to stand out.
pro.needsOnboarding: Complete your professional profile to respond to jobs
pro.needsProRole: Switch to your professional role to respond
pro.syncLinkedTooltip: Your quote is linked to your response and visible in the client's inbox.
pro.syncUnlinkedTooltip: Your quote was saved but isn't fully linked to your response yet. We'll retry automatically — no action needed.

client.shortlistedToast: Shortlisted. The pro has been notified.

hireModal.title: Hire {{name}} for {{price}}?
hireModal.openWorkspace: Your shared Job Workspace opens — messaging, scope, milestones and updates all live in one place.
hireModal.initiatePayment: The secure payment hold is initiated so funds are protected for both sides.
hireModal.declineOthers: The other {{count}} interested professional is politely notified that the job has been awarded.
hireModal.declineOthers_other: The other {{count}} interested professionals are politely notified that the job has been awarded.
hireModal.supportNote: Support and the 28-day resolution process stay available if anything goes wrong.
hireModal.irreversible: This decision is final — you can't switch professionals after hiring.

withdrawModal.title: Withdraw your response?
withdrawModal.body: The client will see you're no longer interested. You can re-engage if the job is still open.
